creator: loldacs23081996@gmail.com
text:
InstaDP is a tool that lets you view profile pictures of other Instagram users. If you have been unable to find someone's profile photo on the app, you can now download the image with the click of a button. The application also helps you unfollow private accounts and finds out who invited you to their account. You can even download the full-size profile picture of a user. InstaDP is a must-have tool for any Instagram user!

To download Insta DP, you'll need a mobile browser. If you don't have a smartphone, you can use your browser to access the website. Just navigate to the instadp.com site and enter your account username to see the full-size profile picture. After that, click the download link in the top right corner. This tool is very easy to use, and you'll be able to save your favorite profile picture in no time.

Insta DP is free to download for Android. After signing up for an account, simply input the username into the search box. The software will then scan Instagram profiles and download full-size images. It also works on private Instagram accounts. Once you've downloaded Insta DP, you can easily browse through Instagram profile pictures and upload your own! Just remember to save the jpg or png file before you use it!
